headline: Europe must support role of long-duration energy storage in electrification, security and competitiveness, trade groups say
summary_80w: The European Commission must “acknowledge the clear role of long-duration energy storage,” organisations including Energy Storage Europe and the LDES Council have urged.

headline: Taiwan’s Recharge Power partners with Energy Decarb for 292MWh battery storage pipeline in Australia
summary_80w: Recharge Power, a Taiwanese battery energy storage system (BESS) developer and integrator, has signed a strategic cooperation agreement with Australian renewable energy developer Energy Decarb to establish a joint venture targeting the Australian solar PV and battery storage market.

headline: Akaysha Energy’s 415MW/1,660MWh Orana BESS reaches full output in Australia

headline: Australia’s Queensland launches AU$200 million fund for solar PV and storage projects in mineral-rich northwest
summary_80w: Queensland has opened a formal call for proposals under the state government’s AU$200 million North West Energy Fund in Australia.

headline: UK’s CfD scheme continues to attract developers, despite looming political uncertainty
summary_80w: The UK renewable energy investment landscape is 'quite good', according to Anastasios Christakis, COO at Queequeg Renewables.

headline: Avangrid completes construction of 166MWdc Oregon solar project

headline: Damp heat and UVID show highest ‘red flag’ rates in 2026 RETC module testing report
summary_80w: Damp heat testing of solar PV modules yielded 11% 'red flag' results in RETC's latest PV Module Index Report.

headline: Insurance market must adapt to hybrid renewable energy projects, report finds

headline: Why co-located PV-plus-storage is the best dispatchable renewable energy source

headline: Sungrow enters PV module production with AI-enabled ‘smart’ product
